items.headline: Alex Zanardi, auto racing champion-turned-Paralympic gold medalist, dies at 59
items.description: ROME (AP) — Alex Zanardi, auto racing champion-turned-Paralympic gold medalist, dies at 59.

items.headline: Alex Zanardi, auto racing champion-turned-Paralympian, dies at 59 after life-altering accidents
items.description:
ROME (AP) — Alex Zanardi, the Italian auto racing champion-turned-Paralympic gold medalist whose career was marked by two life-altering accidents, has died. He was 59.
Zanardi’s family announced his death on Saturday, saying that he passed away on Friday night.
